plugins.name: cats-ats
plugins.description: CATS ATS for Claude Code — connects Claude to your CATS recruiting database via the cloud MCP server, with slash commands, a recruiter subagent, and a candidate-intake skill.

plugins.name: skill-router
plugins.description: The ultimate skill router — auto-launches the best available skills for every task and detects the skills Claude wishes it had. Bundles the skill-router brain plus super-skill-architect and master-skill-forge meta-skills, wired to fire automatically every session and turn via hooks.
